subtasks.description: Query SQL warehouse to calculate average cost per active seat by product for Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec 2024), sorted by average cost descending

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL subtask required: a multi-table join across seats/licensing and cost tables filtered to Q4 2024, grouped by product with aggregation (SUM cost / COUNT active seats). Mid-tier assigned due to multi-table join and grouping/aggregation logic needed to compute the metric correctly. No dependencies; no reconciliation across sources needed.

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_active_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE fiscal_quarter = 4 AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_active_seat DESC
